creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for your offer. To take maintainership, please place your email address in the MAINTAINER section of the port's Makefile and submit a patch against ports' svn tree, you can attach it in this bug report. Please make sure you use the same address as your Bugzilla account so we can track maintainer requests and updates.

For more info on maintainership please consult the Porters Handbook:

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/book.html

and

https://bitbucket.org/koobs/ports
